title: Simply Potion Rings
description: Modern port of the potion fingers mod by Vazkii
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ab92110e4bd2db8d7eb3d7666fcbcae89c17b75.png)

This mod is a 1.20.1+ port of [Potion Fingers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/potion-fingers) by Vazkii

i made this mod because i wanted a simple port of potion fingers to newer minecraft versions without all the extra stuff



Adds 8 new potion rings that give you potion effects of beneficial vanilla effects



This mod is now configurable and new rings can created or existing rings can be removed via adding or removing effect ids in the config, also supports any modded effects



Effects from potion rings stack to get higher level effects

The rings can stack up to 3 times so 3 of the same type of ring = level 3 effect
This value can be changed via config

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4d758af4fb618e7658a0768a11785b398a1fb2e.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f3746da908a810430a517b64961ddffbb796dc0.png)


**Default Potion Rings:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Potion Ring of Regeneration

Potion Ring of Resistance

Potion Ring of Speed

Potion Ring of Strength

Potion Ring of  Jump Boost

Potion Ring of Haste

Potion Ring of Luck

Potion Ring of Health Boost

</details>
